/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/RenderWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/geo/CoordinateTransformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/geo/Wgs84Converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/telemetry/UdpWgs84Receiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/render/GeoSceneRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/render/UavMarkerRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/render/TrajectoryRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment.dir/camera/OrbitCamera.cpp.o -o Demo03GeoCoordinateAlignment  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
